description: RAG-Studio custom agent registry. VS Code discovers .md files in .github/agents/ automatically. This file serves as documentation and model assignment reference.

agents.name: ba
agents.description: Owns system_spec.md. Elicits requirements, writes FRs with Gherkin ACs. Does NOT write code.

agents.name: architect
agents.description: Orchestrator. Gates DoR, decomposes FRs into tasks, spawns @dev and @qa subagents. Does NOT write code.

agents.name: dev
agents.description: Implements one FR at a time. Writes Python/FastAPI/LangGraph code in src/. Returns structured DEV_RESULT JSON.

agents.name: qa
agents.description: Runs pytest, invokes langsmith-eval skill, runs RAGAS metrics. Returns structured QA_VERDICT JSON.
